mapper.select: SELECT t1.id AS id, t1.type_id AS typeId, t1.NAME AS NAME, t1.CODE AS CODE, t1.model AS model, t3.temperature, t3.humidity, t3.start_time, t3.end_time, t3.USER FROM test_instrument as t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_item_instrument_type_rel as t2 ON t1.id = t2.intrusment_type_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM test_instrument_use_record WHERE esc_rel_id = #{escRelId} ) t3 ON t1.id = t3.instrument_id WHERE t2.check_item_id = #{checkItemId}

SELECT t1.id AS itemId, t1.start_time AS startTime, t1.end_time AS endTime, t1.result AS result, t1.test_people testPeople, t1.state As state, t1.origin_url As originUrl, t1.file_url_str as fileUrlStr FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel as t1 WHERE t1.entrust_id = #{entrustId} and t1.sample_id = #{sampleId} and t1.check_item_id = #{checkItemId}

SELECT t1.id AS itemId, t2.check_item_name As checkItemName, t1.start_time AS startTime, t1.end_time AS endTime, t1.result AS result, t1.test_people testPeople, t1.state As state, t1.origin_url As originUrl, t1.file_url_str as fileUrlStr, t1.entrust_id as entrustId, t1.dept_id as deptId, t1.task_id as taskId FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel as t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_item as t2 ON t1.check_item_id = t2.check_item_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}

SELECT t1.id AS itemId, t2.check_item_name As checkItemName, t1.start_time AS startTime, t1.end_time AS endTime, t1.result AS result, t1.test_people testPeople, t1.state As state, t1.origin_url As originUrl, t1.file_url_str as fileUrlStr, t1.entrust_id as entrustId, t1.dept_id as deptId, t1.test_set_url, t1.record_set_url, t1.edit_data FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel as t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_item as t2 ON t1.check_item_id = t2.check_item_id WHERE t1.id in
#{item}

SELECT t1.id AS itemInstrumentMiddleId, t1.id_item AS idItem, t1.intrusment_id, t3.name, t3.code, t3.model FROM test_product_item_instrument_middle_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t2 ON t1.id_item = t2 .id LEFT JOIN test_instrument as t3 ON t3.id = t1.intrusment_id WHERE t2.id = #{checkItemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE test_product_item_instrument_middle_rel set end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id_item = #{sidItem}
mapper.select: SELECT id, id_item as sidItem, intrusment_id as intrusmentId, start_time, end_time FROM test_product_item_instrument_middle_rel WHERE id_item = #{sidItem}

SELECT t2.id, t2.entrust_id, t2.sample_id, t2.state, t2.check_item_name, t2.end_time FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t2 ON t1.entrust_id = t2.entrust_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE test_sample SET state = 2 WHERE id IN ( SELECT sample_id FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel WHERE entrustment_id = #{entrustId} )
mapper.select: select sample_id from test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel where id = #{itemId}
SELECT temperature, humidity, start_time, end_time, USER FROM test_instrument_use_record WHERE esc_rel_id = #{escRelId}
